tmc_spin_cond_t Struct Reference
[Tmc_spin]

A shared memory, spin-based condition variable. More...


Data Fields

unsigned long alloc [__TMC_SPIN_COND_WORDS]
 An array showing which id bits have been allocated to waiters.
unsigned long wait [__TMC_SPIN_COND_WORDS]
 An array showing which ids are currently waiting.

Detailed Description

A shared memory, spin-based condition variable.

This object can be located in any coherent shared memory region, even regions that are mapped at different VAs in different processes.

The structure is aligned to a cacheline for performance reasons, but it is not required to be aligned for correctness.

Field Documentation

unsigned long tmc_spin_cond_t::alloc[__TMC_SPIN_COND_WORDS]

An array showing which id bits have been allocated to waiters.

unsigned long tmc_spin_cond_t::wait[__TMC_SPIN_COND_WORDS]

An array showing which ids are currently waiting.
